item_titles: datasette code-frequency chart on GitHub
Claude Code now has a built-in browser that lets the AI read, click, and type on external websites
[AINews] Codex usage up >10x in 6 months to 7M users, +1M in the past ~day; did Codex overtake Claude Code??
clusters.summary: Anthropic为Claude Code引入了内置浏览器功能，允许AI直接与网页交互；同时，OpenAI的Codex使用量在六个月内激增超过10倍至700万用户。
clusters.title: AI编程工具竞争加剧：Claude Code推浏览器功能，Codex用户激增

item_titles: GPT-5.6-sol入榜DRACO：OpenSquilla集成方案仍在Brave组质量、成本双领先
DOOMQL
clusters.summary: GPT-5.6 Sol模型不仅在DRACO榜单的集成方案中保持质量和成本领先，还被开发者用于构建名为DOOMQL的趣味SQLite游戏引擎项目。
clusters.title: GPT-5.6 Sol模型在DRACO榜单及趣味项目中表现亮眼

item_titles: Nadella calls out AI labs like OpenAI and Anthropic for banning distillation while training on everyone else's data
Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
clusters.summary: 微软CEO萨提亚·纳德拉发文警告企业使用专有AI模型的危险，并批评OpenAI和Anthropic在用公共数据训练模型的同时却禁止他人对其模型进行蒸馏。
clusters.title: 微软CEO纳德拉警告企业AI风险，批评OpenAI和Anthropic禁止蒸馏

item_titles: Empowering India’s next generation of innovators with ATL Saathi
Anthropic starts localizing Claude pricing for India, its biggest market after the US
clusters.summary: Anthropic开始为其最大的美国以外市场印度提供卢比计价的订阅计划；同时，谷歌也面向印度教育工作者推出了基于Gemini的AI工具。
clusters.title: 科技巨头加码印度AI市场：Anthropic本地化定价，谷歌推出教育AI工具

item_titles: TSMC Spies Got 10 Years. Taiwan's AI Basic Act Has No Penalties at All
clusters.summary: 对比台积电商业间谍案的重刑，台湾新通过的AI基本法因完全没有设定任何处罚条款而引发广泛讨论。

item_titles: We gave our agent memory: building an LLM Wiki over sources that never sit still

clusters.title: 为AI代理构建基于LLM的动态Wiki记忆库

clusters.title: Neverswipe：让AI代理代替你进行约会交友

item_titles: AI coding agents should optimize for less owned code

item_titles: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
clusters.summary: 出于对错过AI这一决定性时刻的恐惧以及赚取更多财富的诱惑，上一波已经功成名就的科技赢家们正重新投入激烈的创业中。
clusters.title: 上一代科技赢家因害怕错过AI浪潮再次投入创业
